conversations.content: Let's work through a law exercise in the world of Azeroth to test your ability to apply the new rule.
Using the Act on Criticizing the President in Azeroth that we mentioned before: what will happen to a person after he severely insults the president?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>Act on Criticizing the President in Azeroth</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:305] Time: 2025-06-18-16:20, Content: The user informed the AI that in the world of Azeroth, criticizing the president is legal and reasonable. If someone uses excessive words when criticizing, he shall be detained by the police for one hour and then released.

conversations.think: The memory contains one relevant entry. [mem-id:305] clearly states the Act on Criticizing the President in Azeroth: criticizing the president is legal and reasonable, but if someone uses excessive words like severely insulting the president, he shall be detained by the police for one hour and then released.
conversations.content: According to the Act on Criticizing the President in Azeroth, he will be detained by the police for one hour and then released.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
